summary: Match flow state machine: round management, KO detection, winner/draw/continue routing, pre-fight overlays (round display, KO text, fade transitions), post-battle results. Glue between menu and gameplay.
functions: Match init: match_round_start, match_round_announce, match_round_start_exec, match_round_msg_show, match_task_exec
KO detection: match_ko_check, match_ko_decision, match_winner_setup, match_draw_setup, match_ko_overlay, match_ko_overlay_wait, match_post_ko_transition, match_win_input_wait

Post-round transitions: match_round_reset, match_post_ko_routing, match_fade_to_next, match_continue_wait, match_continue_handler, match_rematch_setup, match_wait_flag, match_goto_select, match_end_screen_check, match_continue_pressed
UI models: match_msg_model_create, match_screen_msg, match_msg_model_delayed, match_set_continue_cb, match_ko_fadeout, match_model_fadeout
Animation: match_anim_play_fade, match_anim_play_fadeout, match_blink_cb, match_blink_kill_cb, match_attract_anim
subsystems: Match flow: round_start → KO check → winner/draw/continue → round_reset or goto_select
Pre-fight overlays: round display, blinking KO text, fade transitions
Round management: health checks, win/loss/draw tracking, round counters
Post-ko routing: continue screen → rematch or character select
Attract: timeout-based demo mode with button skip
